title: Vilfa arabica

Within the genus, it is placed in the family Poaceae. However, the exact classification and its current validity may be subject to change or ongoing research. intro: Vilfa arabica, also known as Arab's Vilfa, is a plant species belonging to the grass family (Poaceae) and is native to the Middle East and North Africa. The health benefits of Vilfa arabica include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
